description_long: This is a modern, modular sofa set consisting of a three-seater section and a matching armless lounge chair, both upholstered in a rich, dark brown material. The surfaces are smooth with subtle horizontal channel tufting on both the seat and backrest, giving a plush, contemporary look. The sofa and chair have a low-profile design with no visible legs, making them appear to rest directly on the floor. The armrests are absent, resulting in a streamlined, minimalist silhouette. The upholstery appears to be faux leather or vinyl, with a slight sheen that enhances the luxurious feel. The overall form is boxy yet softened by rounded edges and deep, comfortable cushioning.
description: A modern, dark brown modular sofa set with channel-tufted cushions, low profile, and no visible armrests or legs. The set includes a three-seater and a matching armless lounge chair.
description_view_0: Front angle view showing the three-seater sofa and matching lounge chair, highlighting the channel-tufted cushions and absence of armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned backs of both sofa and chair, with the low-profile base visible.
description_view_2: Back corner view emphasizing the continuous, boxy shape and the seamless upholstery wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Direct front view clearly showing the seating surfaces, tufted detailing, and the modular arrangement of the sofa and chair.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions on the sofa, with a single seat and back cushion on the lounge chair; all cushions are channel-tufted and integrated.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; sides are flat and continuous with the seat and back, maintaining a minimalist, armless profile.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base appears to rest directly on the floor, suggesting a hidden or plinth-style support.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with horizontal channel tufting; backrest is integrated and matches the seat in width and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown upholstery with horizontal channel tufting, creating a subtle, linear texture; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
